scripts.mobile:start: cd mobile && NODE_OPTIONS=--dns-result-order=ipv4first REACT_NATIVE_PACKAGER_HOSTNAME=127.0.0.1 EXPO_OFFLINE=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 EXPO_NO_REDIRECT_PAGE=1 EXPO_NO_METRO_WORKSPACE_ROOT=1 npx expo start --localhost
scripts.mobile:android: cd mobile && NODE_OPTIONS=--dns-result-order=ipv4first REACT_NATIVE_PACKAGER_HOSTNAME=127.0.0.1 EXPO_OFFLINE=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 EXPO_NO_REDIRECT_PAGE=1 EXPO_NO_METRO_WORKSPACE_ROOT=1 npx expo start --localhost --android
scripts.mobile:ios: cd mobile && NODE_OPTIONS=--dns-result-order=ipv4first REACT_NATIVE_PACKAGER_HOSTNAME=127.0.0.1 EXPO_OFFLINE=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 EXPO_NO_REDIRECT_PAGE=1 EXPO_NO_METRO_WORKSPACE_ROOT=1 npx expo start --localhost --ios
scripts.mobile:android:device: cd mobile && EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 EXPO_NO_METRO_WORKSPACE_ROOT=1 npx expo start --lan --android
